title: cratoxylum floribundum
intro: Cratoxylum floribundum, also known as the Philippine stewartia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Hypericaceae. It is a deciduous shrub or small tree native to the Philippines and other parts of Southeast Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Cratoxylum floribundum include treating fever, sore throat, and skin conditions, and it has been used to make herbal preparations such as infusions and tinctures.
